title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!
